err.fatal.title: Critical Error

graph.title: TETR.IO Growth Analysis — {username} ({count} rounds)
stats.banner_online: Online API — Basic Stats Only (T-Spin, Lines, Finesse available with .ttrm files)
report.title: TETR.IO Training Roadmap — {username}
coach.no_weaknesses: No significant weaknesses found. Maintain your level and aim for the next tier.
weakness.speed_critical.title: Critical Speed Deficit
weakness.speed_critical.desc: PPS {pps} is beginner level. Focus on basic piece placement speed first.
weakness.speed_critical.drill: Repeat 40L sprints. Goal: under 2 minutes. Fast but accurate placement.
weakness.speed_major.title: Speed Improvement Needed
weakness.speed_major.desc: PPS {pps} puts you at a speed disadvantage.
weakness.speed_major.drill: Alternate 40L sprints and Blitz. Aim for sub-1-minute sprints.
weakness.attack_critical.title: Critical Attack Deficit
weakness.attack_critical.desc: APM {apm} means almost no attack output.
weakness.attack_critical.drill: Learn T-Spin Double patterns + Quad stacking. Practice openers on FOUR.lol.
weakness.attack_major.title: Weak Attack Output
weakness.attack_major.desc: APM {apm} shows low attack efficiency. Use T-Spins and combos.
weakness.attack_major.drill: Learn TKI or DT Cannon openers to secure early-game attack.
weakness.tspin_major.title: T-Spin Underutilized
weakness.tspin_major.desc: T-Spin rate {rate}% — barely used. T-Spins are key to efficient attack.
weakness.tspin_major.drill: Start with STSD pattern. Practice making T-holes on top of S/Z pieces.
weakness.tspin_minor.title: T-Spin Usage Could Improve
weakness.tspin_minor.desc: T-Spin rate {rate}% — decent but more active use will boost attack.
weakness.tspin_minor.drill: Actively look for T-Spin opportunities during downstacking. Try LST Stacking.
weakness.finesse_critical.title: Critical Finesse Issues
weakness.finesse_critical.desc: Finesse Fault {rate}% — over half of placements are suboptimal.
weakness.finesse_critical.drill: Practice 2-key placement at slow speed. Refer to a Finesse guide.
weakness.finesse_major.title: Finesse Needs Improvement
weakness.finesse_major.desc: Finesse Fault {rate}% — too many unnecessary key inputs.
weakness.finesse_major.drill: Memorize optimal movement paths for each piece. Practice SRS kick 2-key placements.
weakness.defense_major.title: Defense Overload / Low Attack
weakness.defense_major.desc: Attack {sent}L vs Received {recv}L — receiving far more garbage than sending.
weakness.defense_major.drill: Improve downstacking efficiency and attempt preemptive attacks before receiving garbage.
weakness.winrate.title: Low Win Rate
weakness.winrate.drill: Review losing replays and analyze decisions in the last 20 seconds.
weakness.tsd_unused.title: TSD (T-Spin Double) Not Used
weakness.tsd_unused.desc: Not using the most efficient attack method: TSD.
weakness.tsd_unused.drill: Start with TKI opener (TSD in first bag). See FOUR.lol TKI guide.
strength.good_tspin: Good T-Spin usage ({rate}%) — Effective T-Spin utilization.
strength.good_finesse: High finesse accuracy (Fault {rate}%) — Near-optimal key inputs.
strength.high_winrate: High win rate ({rate}%) — Overall skill advantage.
strength.data_needed: Play more games to see your strengths.
matchup.counter_4wide_slow: vs 4-wide combo: Send 2-3 lines quickly to break the combo. Preemptive TSD is effective if slow.
matchup.counter_4wide_fast: vs 4-wide combo: Use your speed to send lines quickly and break combo timing.
matchup.counter_tspin_weak: vs T-Spin chains: Focus on downstacking, counter with Quads.
matchup.counter_tspin_strong: vs T-Spin chains: Counter with your own T-Spins or exploit timing gaps.
matchup.counter_pco: vs PCO: Send 2+ lines in the first 10 pieces to break PC conditions.
learning.beginner_1: Prioritize accuracy over speed. Correct placement is the foundation.
learning.beginner_2: Practice stable Quad stacking with 6-3 Stacking.
learning.beginner_3: Memorize one opener (TKI) well — your win rate will increase significantly.
learning.intermediate_1: Practice choosing between 2-3 openers based on piece sequence.
learning.intermediate_2: Apply STSD naturally during midgame — this is crucial.
learning.intermediate_3: Consciously practice counter-strategies against opponent builds.
learning.advanced_2: Practice advanced continuous T-Spin techniques like LST Stacking.
learning.advanced_3: Learn to read opponent attack timing and counter effectively.
verdict.finesse: Fix placement accuracy ({rate}%) before focusing on speed or attack. Memorize optimal paths.
verdict.speed: {style} playstyle but speed ({pps} PPS) is holding you back. Sprint practice is most effective.
verdict.attack: Not converting {speed} speed into attacks. Learning opener builds will significantly boost APM.
verdict.tspin: Fundamentals are there but T-Spin underuse lowers attack efficiency. Learning one TSD pattern makes a big difference.
verdict.defense: Can't handle incoming garbage. Improve downstacking efficiency and practice preemptive attacks.
verdict.default: Most urgent issue: "{title}". Focus on improving this first.
verdict.balanced: Overall stable play. Keep playing consistently to maintain and improve.
